validation_results.code_quality: Passes all quality gates. Black formatting, type hints, proper docstrings confirmed.
edge_cases_covered: mix of stored and DLQ episodes

criteria_verification.notes: audit_published_episodes() reconciles published episodes against StoreProtocol and DLQClientProtocol. Independent tests confirm functionality.
Classification logic iterates all published_natural_keys and tracks stored_count and dlq_count. Tests verify both stored and DLQ classification paths.

Unaccounted episodes tracked in unaccounted_episodes list. is_100_percent_accounted property returns False when unaccounted_count > 0. test_missing_record_reported_unaccounted explicitly verifies this.
is_100_percent_accounted property returns True when unaccounted_count == 0. test_all_stored_reports_100_percent and test_dlq_episode_counts_as_accounted verify 100% reporting.

AC explicitly allows unit tests as sufficient. Independent verification confirms 3 unit tests pass covering all three required scenarios: all stored → 100%, DLQ episode → accounted, missing record → unaccounted. Note: BDD scenario is pending but not required by this AC.
All quality gates pass. Code follows Black formatting, uses type hints, follows naming conventions. Tests pass with reported 100% coverage.

rationale: All six acceptance criteria verified through independent test execution (3/3 unit tests passed) and quality gate verification (all gates passed). Evidence bundle confirms reconciliation logic, classification behavior, failure reporting, 100% accounted detection, comprehensive test coverage, and code quality. Honesty discrepancy is should_fix (reporting error from task-work delegation, not fabrication). BDD scenario pending is noted but AC-005 explicitly allows unit tests as sufficient coverage.
